ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the car */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the car */,
  "vehicle_age" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "km_driven" INTEGER /* Kilometers driven by the vehicle */,
  "seller_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of seller (individual or dealer) */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of transmission used by the vehicle */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "engine" INTEGER /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power of the vehicle */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "selling_price" INTEGER /* Selling price of the vehicle */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the car was produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of the car body (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors the car has */,
  "is_new" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the car is new or used */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the car is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_transmission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_type_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_seller_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_type_id") REFERENCES seller_types ("seller_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_types" (
  "seller_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller type */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the seller type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who bought the car */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the car was sold */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "payment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment plan used */,
  "discount_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "final_sale_price" INTEGER /* Final price after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_plan_id") REFERENCES payment_plans ("payment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales representative, manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the car in the inventory */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale for which the review was given */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the dealership to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_prices" (
  "market_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market price entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car for which the market price is given */,
  "market_price" INTEGER /* Market price of the car */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the market price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market price (e.g., website, auction) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the market price is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_prices_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_prices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_comparisons" (
  "price_comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price comparison entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car for which the price comparison is given */,
  "market_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market price used for comparison */,
  "price_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between the market price and the selling price */,
  "comparison_source" TEXT /* Source of the price comparison (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_comparisons_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_comparisons_market_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_price_id") REFERENCES market_prices ("market_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "payment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment plan */,
  "duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of the payment plan in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the payment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)
